scripts.dev:staging: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env.staging')) { fs.copyFileSync('.env.staging', '.env.development.local'); console.log('Copied .env.staging to .env.development.local for staging dev'); }" && next dev --webpack
scripts.build:staging: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env.staging')) { fs.copyFileSync('.env.staging', '.env.production.local'); console.log('Copied .env.staging to .env.production.local for staging build'); }" && prisma generate && next build --webpack
